description_long: This lamp features a cylindrical, metallic body adorned with evenly spaced, raised spherical studs, giving it a robust and industrial appearance. The upper section is topped with a dome-shaped head, which includes two protruding rods and a central black lens or eye-like feature, suggesting a directional light source. Around the neck, there are ribbed, ring-like structures and a pair of articulated appendages—one ending in a disc and the other in a rod—possibly serving as controls or sensors. The base is wide, faceted, and black, providing stability and a strong visual anchor. The lamp's color palette is dominated by bronze and gold tones, with black and silver accents, contributing to a retro-futuristic aesthetic. The overall design is highly stylized, with a blend of functional and decorative elements that make it a striking urban fixture.
description: A bronze and gold cylindrical lamp with a dome top, raised studs, and articulated appendages, set on a wide black base. Its retro-futuristic design features both functional and decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view shows the dome top with two rods, central lens, and both appendages visible, highlighting the symmetrical studded body and wide black base.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the length and articulation of the appendages, with the disc and rod extending outward, and the layered neck structure more prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view focuses on the studded cylindrical body and the ribbed neck, with the dome top and rods visible but appendages less prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the appendages from a different angle, emphasizing their mechanical joints and the overall profile of the lamp.
